subcodes.first_line: O thou who art afflicted by trials in the path of God! Though this cup be bitter to the taste of the wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبتلای بلا در سبیل خدا اگرچه این کاس در مذاق عاقلان کدر آشام و در کام تن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @predictions and prophecies
